text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, December 13. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need billing integration immediately. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the recent logs for that. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: That's wonderful. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Sleep quality is so important. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Updating our financial spreadsheets. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Smart financial planning. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Understood. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, I'm reviewing the scheduling portal specs for Vertex Health. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That is a common bottleneck. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great consistency with running. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that updating our financial spreadsheets. First United Mortgage offered 5.8% with zero points. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Refinancing is a great leverage point. A rate of 5.8% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Let's break this down. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
